evidence: Plain curl with realistic Chrome User-Agent + headers returned HTTP 429 with 'Vercel Security Checkpoint' HTML for every probed URL (homepage, /recipes/chicken, /recipes/<slug>, /robots.txt, /blog.rss).

Surf v1.0.199 with Builder().Impersonate().Chrome() returned HTTP 200 for /recipes/chicken (186KB), /search?query=brownies (268KB), and /recipes/<slug> (95KB) — all containing __NEXT_DATA__ and live SSR data.

browser-use 0.12.5 (Chromium) loaded the homepage with no _vcrcs Vercel clearance cookie set after challenge resolution; subsequent navigations remained cleared without cookie state, indicating passive TLS-fingerprint mitigation rather than active JS challenge.
Surf in this configuration is the same transport the printing-press generator emits when reachability.mode=browser_http (see internal/browsersniff/reachability.go ApplyReachabilityDefaults).

protocols.label: ssr_embedded_data
protocols.notes: Next.js __NEXT_DATA__ inline JSON on every page; full pageProps payload present

protocols.label: next_data_json
protocols.notes: GET /_next/data/<buildId>/<path>.json returns same pageProps without HTML wrapper; preferred for clean parsing

protocols.label: schema_org_jsonld
protocols.notes: Recipe detail pages include <script type="application/ld+json"> with Recipe @type

auth.notes: No Food52 user authentication required for any reachable read-only surface. The x-typesense-api-key header value is a public search-only key embedded in the public JavaScript bundle (Typesense's intended pattern, equivalent to Algolia's public app key or Stripe's publishable key). The CLI discovers and caches this key at runtime by parsing _app-<hash>.js — the key value is never written into the spec, generated source, or any committed artifact. If Food52 rotates the key, the CLI re-extracts on the next 401/403.

protections.label: vercel_bot_mitigation_passive_tls
protections.notes: x-vercel-mitigated: challenge + x-vercel-challenge-token on plain HTTP requests; cleared by Chrome TLS impersonation, no JS challenge required

warnings: Hotline (/hotline, /hotline/questions/<topic>) returns only siteSettings in pageProps and renders no question/answer data in the DOM. The community Q&A is effectively unreachable for unauthenticated read scrapers. Excluded from CLI scope.
Shop endpoints exist on shop.food52.com and food52.myshopify.com/api/2025-01/graphql.json but require Shopify Storefront API token discovery; deferred from v1.

buildId (Pq8fQj0nm7uTx90i5u0si at the time of browser-sniff) and _app.js bundle hash change on every Food52 deploy. The CLI's runtime discovery (buildId from __NEXT_DATA__.buildId, key from regex over the active _app-<hash>.js) handles rotation transparently.

Typesense /collections endpoint requires the admin key (search-only key returns 403 there). The CLI does not list collections; it queries the known collection name 'recipes_production_food52_current' directly.
